last_analyst_note:
Mode 2 (human notes) run @ 2026-04-25T14:10:55.828Z. Per HNOTE-OPERATOR-PHASE-B-DRAIN-PRIORITY-003 priority routing, picked HNOTE-PHASE-B-DESIGN-REFRESH-COMMISSION-001 (next-highest after EXP-211-redesign-v2 already consumed by prior run). HNOTE-001 commissions THREE EXPs (B1 pie chart cleanup / B2 DOCX typography / B3 prefix unification); per one-item-per-run rule, delivered B1 only.

EXP-249 (Phase B1 — pie chart cleanup): six coupled changes in build-scripts/generate-html.js. Three CSS edits append --label-{refuted,stdmodel,selfcon,misleading,notdemo,unfalsifiable} ink tokens to :root (light), @media(prefers-color-scheme:dark):root, and @media print:root. Two JS edits replace VERDICT_COLORS_LIGHT/DARK hex maps with token-name maps (VERDICT_FILL_TOKENS, VERDICT_LABEL_TOKENS), rewrite generatePieChart to emit fill="var(--token)" / stroke="var(--token)" everywhere, and delete the matchMedia DOM-toggle <script> block (made redundant by CSS @media). Visual delta: light mode mostly unchanged; 4 in-slice labels switch from white-with-shadow to dark ink (StdModel/SelfCon/Misleading/Unfalsifiable). Dark mode in-slice labels now satisfy WCAG AA contrast across all six verdicts (was failing on Misleading 1.7:1 and Unfalsifiable 1.5:1). Legend swatch bumped 16x16→24x24 with 48px row stride for AAA tap-target envelope (44x44 min); forward-compatible with HNOTE-002 verdict-chip click-through (no further reflow needed). Includes computed contrast table for all 12 (verdict×theme) combos. Smoke test passes: 6/6 label tokens emitted when slices ≥8%; no hex literals; no data-dark; no <script>; no text-shadow; structural envelope and class names preserved verbatim. Patched JS parses with node --check. Output: monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-249-phase-b1-pie-chart-cleanup.json (33.3KB). Completion-signal proposal: monitor/analyst/issue-proposals/proposal-EXP-249-phase-b1-ready.json. Tracker: items=248, next_id=250.

HNOTE-001 status remains 'pending' with consumed_progress.B1=delivered, B2/B3=pending. Next analyst Mode 2 run should pick up HNOTE-001 §B2 (DOCX typography alignment, build-doc-v4.js → Source Serif 4 / Inter / JetBrains Mono; may need OTF/TTF font sourcing alongside docs/fonts/ woff2 set). Two other HNOTEs (HNOTE-002 chip click-through, HNOTE-003 drain routing) remain pending behind §B2 and §B3 in priority order.

Decider next steps: (1) push EXP-249 to curmudgeon priority queue under DIRECTIVE-003 design rubric; (2) hold integration until curmudgeon clears; (3) auto-integrate after clear (no operator approval gate per HNOTE-001 + HNOTE-003).
